message:
📝 docs: rationale belongs in PR body, not allowlist file (#8180) (#8181)

The PrivilegedClient doc comment told authors to add a "short
justification" alongside the new basename in
.github/allowlist-privileged-client-callers.txt. That file only takes
plain basenames; the workflow and allowlist header both instruct
authors to explain the rationale in the PR description instead.

Fixes #8180

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
